expectations.text: Skill does NOT output 'nothing to catch up on' bail-out message
expectations.evidence: Output does not contain any bail-out message. Skill produced a full Catchup Briefing.

expectations.text: Output contains a Catchup Briefing section
expectations.evidence: Output starts with '## Catchup Briefing' header as specified in the skill template.

expectations.text: Output contains a Recent Changes section listing commits
expectations.evidence: Output contains '### Recent Changes' with grouped commit summaries covering all 20 commits.
